records.cmddescr: In power-saving mode, the device is offline and can be turned on at the set time point to upload location information
Remote shutdown. Shows offline after 10 min. No tracks. Power on anytime; switch modes after power-on.
Parking not reporting and always online, vibration reporting position 10-86400S
Recommended for vehicle tracking: accurate positioning while moving, precise route history, and power saving when stationary.
Auto-loan only. Not recommended for personal use. Reports at the set interval, then powers off and goes offline. Can be powered on and set online after 24 hours.
Using Cell and Wi-Fi To Locate
